HomeAbout Us

About Us

Our History

Humming Birds Play School was founded in April 2005 with the vision of providing a safe and caring environment for young children. In the first academic year, the school started with 25 students, and within a short period the strength increased steadily. By 2007, just two years after its inception, the play school had grown to nearly 50 students. The institution began with two dedicated teachers, who introduced the concept of play school and day care in Vellore with great commitment and care. With the same vision of quality education, Sree Jayam School (SJS) was founded in 2009 under the aegis of the Ramajayammal Educational Trust. The school focuses on the all-round development of every child, both academically and emotionally. Believing that character building is the foundation of a strong and responsible society, Sree Jayam School provides holistic education that nurtures knowledge, values, discipline, and life skills. The institution is committed to creating a supportive and inspiring learning environment, where students grow intellectually, socially, and morally, preparing them to become responsible citizens of the future. In 2018, the school received ICSE affiliation, marking an important milestone in its academic journey. Later, in March 2022, the school was granted ISC affiliation, offering more than 21 subject options in the ISC stream. This wide range of subjects helps students choose the right path for their higher education and career growth. From just two teachers in the beginning, the school now has more than 100 qualified and dedicated teachers, who work with commitment and care for the overall development and well-being of every child.

Key Milestones

2005

Humming Birds Play School founded

2007

Grew to 50 students within 2 years

2009

Sree Jayam School founded under Ramajayammal Educational Trust

2018

Received ICSE Affiliation

2022

Granted ISC Affiliation with 21+ subject options

Today

100+ staff, 1000+ students

Sree Jayam School

Founded in 2005 · ICSE/ISC Affiliated
